method: Three isolated process imports of app plus core.app.runner, measured with /usr/bin/time; medians reported.
interpretation: Startup/import improvement is modest and within normal process variance. The larger expected gain is reduced rerun/render work from lazy database pagination, no duplicate Finder calculation, bounded previews and on-demand export serialization; that benefit depends on the user's real dataset and cannot be honestly converted into a phone-temperature claim in this environment.
